<!-- Describe the feature in a sentence or two. -->

## Why it'd help

<!-- What problem does this solve for you? Who else might benefit? -->

<!-- Optional: rough sketch of UI, behaviour, settings. No need to design it for me. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional: any workarounds you've tried, or other tools that do this. -->

Before submitting, please skim existing [open issues](https://github.com/alchemycharlie/dvsa-earlier-slot-watcher/issues) and [closed issues](https://github.com/alchemycharlie/dvsa-earlier-slot-watcher/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed), your idea might already be tracked or have been previously considered.
